subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down through grace unto him who hath turned towards God on a Day wherein mankind hath turned away from the Lord of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالفضل لمن اقبل فی یوم فیه اعرض الناس عن الله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
